name: skill-rails-upgrade
description: Analyze Rails apps and provide upgrade assessments
capabilities: Detect current Rails version from Gemfile and Gemfile.lock
Fetch latest Rails version from GitHub API
Classify upgrade type (patch, minor, or major)
Fetch and summarize official Rails upgrade guides
Generate file change diffs from railsdiff.org
Create selective merge plans that preserve local customizations
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The 'external_commands' detections are shell command examples in documentation (not code execution). The 'network' detections are legitimate Rails documentation URLs. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' detections are false positives - YAML frontmatter and plain text were incorrectly flagged. This is a legitimate Rails upgrade assistant skill with no security concerns.
valueStatement: This skill analyzes your Rails application and provides a comprehensive upgrade assessment with version-specific guidance and a selective file merge plan to safely upgrade to newer Rails versions.
limitations: Does not execute the upgrade - provides guidance only
Cannot automatically resolve all breaking changes
Requires user confirmation before making file changes
Does not test the application after upgrade

useCases.targetUser: Rails developers planning major version upgrades
useCases.title: Planning a Rails 7 to 8 upgrade
useCases.description: Get a comprehensive assessment of what changes are needed to upgrade from Rails 7.x to Rails 8.x, including breaking changes and required file updates.

useCases.title: Safe incremental upgrades
useCases.description: Follow a step-by-step process that checks for local customizations before updating files, ensuring no project-specific changes are lost.

useCases.targetUser: Full-stack Rails developers with JavaScript dependencies
useCases.title: JavaScript dependency alignment
useCases.description: Check and recommend updates for Rails-related JavaScript packages (Turbo, Stimulus, Action Cable) to match the target Rails version.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Rails upgrade check
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the rails-upgrade skill to analyze this Rails application and tell me what version it is running and what the latest Rails version is.
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick version check before planning an upgrade

promptTemplates.title: Full upgrade assessment
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the rails-upgrade skill to perform a complete upgrade assessment. I want to upgrade from my current version to the latest Rails. Provide a summary of breaking changes, new files needed, and a plan for handling my local customizations.
promptTemplates.scenario: Comprehensive upgrade planning with detailed analysis

promptTemplates.title: Selective file merge plan
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the rails-upgrade skill to generate a selective file update plan. Check which config files have local customizations and show me exactly what would change for each file.
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating a safe upgrade plan with manual merge guidance

promptTemplates.title: JavaScript dependency audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the rails-upgrade skill to check my JavaScript dependencies. I use npm/yarn and want to ensure my Rails-related packages (Turbo, Stimulus) are compatible with the target Rails version.
promptTemplates.scenario: Checking JS package compatibility before upgrade

bestPractices: Always run the upgrade analysis on a clean git branch before making changes
Review deprecation warnings in your current version before upgrading
Test each framework default enablement one at a time
Keep your JavaScript dependencies aligned with your Rails version
antiPatterns: Running rails app:update directly without checking for local customizations
Skipping the JavaScript dependency audit when using Turbo or Stimulus
Ignoring deprecation warnings before starting the upgrade
Enabling all new framework defaults at once without testing

faq.question: What versions of Rails can this skill help upgrade?
faq.answer: This skill can help with upgrades from Rails 5.0 through the latest Rails 8.x. It works for patch, minor, and major version upgrades.

faq.question: Does this skill automatically update my application?
faq.answer: No. The skill analyzes your application and creates an upgrade plan. It shows you what will change and requires your confirmation before modifying any files.

faq.question: Will I lose my local customizations?
faq.answer: No. The skill specifically checks for local customizations in config files and bin scripts. It never overwrites customized files without showing you what would change first.

faq.question: What if I do not have the gh CLI installed?
faq.answer: The skill will still work but you will need to manually check for the latest Rails version. The gh CLI is only used for fetching the most recent release information.

faq.question: Can this skill help with JavaScript dependencies?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill checks npm/yarn packages and importmap pins for Rails-related JavaScript libraries like Turbo, Stimulus, Action Cable, and Active Storage.

faq.question: What happens after the file updates?
faq.answer: After updating files, the skill guides you through running migrations, testing the application, and enabling new framework defaults one by one.
